papers.title: PerceptUI: LLM Agents as Human-Aligned Synthetic Users for UI/UX Evaluation
papers.summary: Proposes LLM agents that act as human-aligned synthetic users to evaluate UI/UX, aiming to approximate real user perception during interface testing.
papers.summary_zh: 提出将 LLM 智能体作为与人对齐的合成用户来评估 UI/UX，力图在界面测试中逼近真实用户的感知。

papers.title: Avenir-UX: Automated UX Evaluation via Simulated Human Web Interaction with GUI Grounding
papers.summary: Automates UX evaluation by simulating human web interaction with GUI grounding, letting LLM agents operate real interfaces to surface usability issues.
papers.summary_zh: 通过带 GUI 定位的模拟人类网页交互实现 UX 自动评估，让 LLM 智能体在真实界面中操作以发现可用性问题。

papers.title: Personagram: Bridging Personas and Product Design for Creative Ideation with Multimodal LLMs
papers.summary: Bridges user personas and product design for creative ideation using multimodal LLMs.
papers.summary_zh: 借助多模态大模型，将用户画像与产品设计连接起来以支持创意构思。

papers.title: Lost in Simulation: LLM-Simulated Users are Unreliable Proxies for Human Users in Agentic Evaluations
papers.summary: Argues that LLM-simulated users can be unreliable proxies for real humans in agentic evaluations, cautioning against over-trusting simulated user studies.
papers.summary_zh: 指出在智能体评估中，LLM 模拟用户可能并不能可靠地替代真实用户，提醒不要过度信任模拟用户研究。

papers.title: Evalet: Evaluating Large Language Models through Functional Fragmentation
papers.summary: Proposes evaluating LLMs by functionally fragmenting their behavior to give a more fine-grained view of capability.
papers.summary_zh: 提出通过“功能碎片化”来评估大模型，从而更细粒度地刻画其能力。

papers.title: UXAgent: A System for Simulating Usability Testing of Web Design with LLM Agents
papers.summary: A system that simulates usability testing of web designs with LLM agents, generating usability findings before recruiting human participants.
papers.summary_zh: 一个用 LLM 智能体模拟网页设计可用性测试的系统，在招募真实被试前就生成可用性发现。
